dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3898 IS: Gerald’s Law Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Boozman (for himself and Mr. Peters) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Senator Elizabeth Dole 21st Century Veterans Healthcare and Benefits Improvement Act to extend burial benefits for certain veterans who die at home while in receipt of hospice care furnished by the Department of Veterans Affairs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Gerald’s Law Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: Extension of burial benefits for certain veterans who die at home while in receipt of hospice care furnished by Department of Veterans Affairs
section.text: Section 301(c)(2) of the Senator Elizabeth Dole 21st Century Veterans Healthcare and Benefits Improvement Act (38 U.S.C. 2303 note) is amended by striking 2026 and inserting 2030.
